desc: Replace terminal audit gate with convergence-based roadmap chaining. Every DAG terminates by producing the next iteration spec. advance <term> validates the spec, archives the completed DAG, installs the successor as new head. Terminal planning node gets an enriched brief aggregating all six context layers. Remove gap expansion, scope leak detection, retroactive DAG mutation. The agent never halts — the human controls iteration scope externally.

init.desc: Synthetic init — roots all independent tasks

delete-gap-expansion.desc: Delete src/lib/terminal-audit/gap-expansion.ts. Remove import and expandGaps() call from bin/roadmap.ts (lines 716-737). Remove TERMINAL_AUDIT_EXPANDED trail recording.

remove-scope-leak.desc: Remove scope-leak gap type from detected.ts — delete detection pass, remove from GapType union, remove prompt template from validator.ts, remove getBranchChangedFiles() from terminal audit section in bin/roadmap.ts.

chain-store.desc: Create src/lib/chain.ts. Types: ChainLink { dagId, iteration, predecessorId, completedAt, successorDagId, executionReport? }. Storage: .roadmap/chain.jsonl (append-only). Functions: appendLink(repoRoot, link), loadChain(repoRoot) -> ChainLink[], currentIteration(repoRoot) -> number, archiveHead(repoRoot) — moves head.json to heads/<dagId>.json and updates head-index.json with predecessor field. getRootIntent(repoRoot) -> string — walks chain to iteration 0 and reads its spec description.

demote-audit-to-summary.desc: Remove terminal audit as a gate from bin/roadmap.ts:693-757. Keep computeReport() — emit as informational summary in terminal advance output. Delete: passed field, evaluateResponses(), prompt generation, --evaluate-file audit response handling, TERMINAL_AUDIT_FAILED recording. validator.ts exports only runAudit() returning TerminalAuditContext (computed + detected info, no pass/fail).

execution-report-schema.desc: Define ExecutionReport type in src/lib/chain.ts (or co-located): { nodesExecuted, totalDuration, retriesPerNode, tokensConsumed?, observations: string[], blockers: string[], deltaAssessment: string }. Add parseExecutionReport(filePath) that reads and validates the JSON. Repurpose --evaluate-file on advance <term> to accept this schema instead of the old AuditResponse[] format.

terminal-brief-enrichment.desc: Rewrite getBrief() for terminal nodes in src/lib/agent-dispatch/brief-gate.ts (or wherever getBrief is implemented). Terminal brief aggregates six context layers: (1) completion evidence from completed.json, (2) handoff journals from .roadmap/.handoff/, (3) computed audit summary from computeReport(), (4) chain history from chain.jsonl including iteration number and root intent, (5) execution report from --evaluate-file if provided, (6) remaining detected gaps (informational, from detected.ts minus scope-leak). Brief shape: TerminalBrief { rootIntent, iteration, chainHistory: ChainLink[], completionEvidence, handoffSummaries, computedSummary, executionReport?, detectedGaps }.

terminal-advance-chain.desc: Rewrite terminal advance in bin/roadmap.ts. After term validators pass: (1) build TerminalBrief — aggregate all six context layers, (2) find the successor spec JSON in term's produces (file ending in .json matching SpecIR schema), (3) validate via internal make pipeline (define/verify/check), (4) if --evaluate-file provided, parse as ExecutionReport and include in chain link, (5) archiveHead() — move current head.json to heads/<dagId>.json, (6) install validated successor as new head.json, (7) appendLink() to chain.jsonl with iteration number + execution report, (8) emit completion summary including TerminalBrief. If make fails on the successor spec, term advance fails — agent fixes the spec and retries. Term always chains.

orient-chain-context.desc: Extend orient output: add chain field { iteration, predecessorId, dagId, rootIntent } to orient response. Read from chain.jsonl via currentIteration() and getRootIntent(). Agents see which convergence iteration they're in, where the chain started, and what the original goal was.

test-chain-lifecycle.desc: Integration tests: (1) create DAG where term produces a successor spec, advance all nodes, verify term advance archives current DAG to heads/, installs successor as head.json, chain.jsonl has link with iteration=1. (2) Second iteration — advance new DAG's term with another successor spec, verify chain.jsonl has iteration=2, predecessor links correct, root intent traces back. (3) Verify orient shows chain context with iteration + rootIntent. (4) Verify term advance fails if successor spec is structurally invalid. (5) Verify --evaluate-file with ExecutionReport is stored in chain link. (6) Verify terminal brief contains all six layers.

chain-terminal-verified.desc: Terminal — convergence chain works end-to-end. Gap expansion deleted, scope leak deleted, terminal audit demoted to summary, terminal brief aggregates six context layers, --evaluate-file repurposed for execution reports, advance <term> always chains, completed DAGs archived as immutable heads, orient shows iteration context + root intent.
